holdings.infoBox: NUKZ is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cameco stock at 8.89%, Samsung C&T at 4.05%, GE Vernova at 3.47%, Talen Energy at 3.36%, and Rolls-Royce Holdings at 3.15%.

overview.description: The Range Nuclear Renaissance Index ETF (NUKZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the VettaFi Nuclear Renaissance index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of stocks of companies from around the world that are operating within the nuclear fuel and energy industry. NUKZ was launched on Jan 23, 2024 and is issued by Range.
